title: Sovereign Story
description: A user story in the Sovereign Platform sprint system (v2)

phase.description: Phase number this story belongs to

priority.description: Priority (lower = higher priority). 0 = pull immediately regardless of phase — reserved for system-health and model-coherence stories that unblock everything else.

points.description: Story points. Hard maximum: 8. Stories > 8 pts are rejected at planning and must be split. Grooming ceremony flags anything > 5 as a split candidate.

branchName.description: Git branch name for this story (must start with feature/)

description.description: What to build — specific enough to implement without further clarification

smart.description: SMART scoring (1-5 each). Populated by smart-check ceremony.

testPlan.description: How to verify this story is done — concrete commands or checks

dependencies.description: Story IDs that must be accepted before this story can start

acceptanceCriteria.description: Verifiable pass/fail criteria — each must be independently checkable

passes.description: True when Ralph has self-graded this story as complete

reviewed.description: True only when the review ceremony has independently verified all ACs

reviewNotes.description: Failure details written by the review ceremony when re-opening a story

attempts.description: Number of times this story has been re-opened by the review ceremony

readinessNote.description: Set by planning ceremony when a story is not-ready for the current sprint

requiredCapabilities.description: Tools or env vars required to fully test this story (e.g. HETZNER_TOKEN, kind, helm). Pre-flight ceremony cross-references these against the environment and flags stories where capabilities are missing. Missing capabilities do NOT block coding — they block integration testing only.

blocker.description: Set by Ralph (or pre-flight) when a story cannot be completed or integration-tested due to a missing prerequisite. A story with a blocker should have passes:false and code pushed to its branch.

name.description: Specific name of the missing thing (e.g. HETZNER_TOKEN, kind, a live K8s cluster)

description.description: What the missing thing is needed for and how to resolve it

codeComplete.description: True if the code was fully written and pushed — only integration testing is blocked

preFlightNotes.description: Notes added by the pre-flight ceremony about missing capabilities for this story
